creator: vsasjason@gmail.com
text:
Vim totally ignores any system vimrc. Last working revision: 373363

Tried last version:
vim-7.4.540_1
Name           : vim
Version        : 7.4.540_1
Installed on   : Thu Dec 11 00:24:54 EET 2014
Origin         : editors/vim
Architecture   : freebsd:10:x86:64
Prefix         : /usr/local
Categories     : editors
Licenses       : 
Maintainer     : sunpoet@FreeBSD.org
WWW            : http://www.vim.org/
Comment        : Improved version of the vi editor
Options        :
        ATHENA         : off
        CONSOLE        : on
        CSCOPE         : off
        DEFAULT_VIMRC  : off
        EXUBERANT_CTAGS: off
        GNOME          : off
        GTK2           : off
        LUA            : off
        MOTIF          : off
        NLS            : on
        PERL           : off
        PYTHON         : off
        RUBY           : off
        TCL            : off
        X11            : off
        XTERM_SAVE     : off
Shared Libs required:
        libintl.so.8
Annotations    :
        cpe            : cpe:2.3:a:vim:vim:7.4:::::freebsd10:x64:1
Flat size      : 26.4MiB

Tried to put vimrc into /usr/local/etc, /etc, /usr/local/share/vim, /usr/local/share/vim/vim74 directories - doesn't works.
